final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='4204'));
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 3 is planned to query database 'stormflohavniva', not 'kommuner'. Use the planned database for this step or produce a new plan with different step numbers.", "step": 3, "action": "query"}

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) with minimal columns

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons (flomareal with gjentaksintervall=200) with minimal columns

5.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to municipality extent (stormflo_in_kommune)

6.description: reduce flood polygons to municipality extent (flomareal_in_kommune)

9.description: find buildings that intersect both by joining building lists on bygningid

10.description: sort final buildings by bygningid ascending and limit to 10

iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"matrikkelenbygning","purpose":"get buildings in that municipality"},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"stormflohavniva","purpose":"get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) with minimal columns"},{"step":4,"action":"query","database":"flomsoner","purpose":"get 200-year flood polygons (flomareal with gjentaksintervall=200) with minimal columns"},{"step":5,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"reduce storm-surge polygons to municipality extent (stormflo_in_kommune)"},{"step":6,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"reduce flood polygons to municipality extent (flomareal_in_kommune)"},{"step":7,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"find buildings that intersect stormflo_in_kommune"},{"step":8,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"find buildings that intersect flomareal_in_kommune"},{"step":9,"action":"attribute_join","database":null,"purpose":"find buildings that intersect both by joining building lists on bygningid"},{"step":10,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"sort final buildings by bygningid ascending and limit to 10"}]}
